meta_title: Meet Dr Faizal Secretary | My Private Clinic — Fulwood, Preston
meta_description: Dr Faizal Secretary is a GMC-registered UK-trained GP at My Private Clinic, Fulwood, Preston. Every appointment, every consultation — always Dr Secretary.
hero_sub: Founder and Lead GP at My Private Clinic. NHS-trained, GMC registered, CQC approved.
name: Dr Faizal Secretary
role: Founder & Lead GP, My Private Clinic
qualifications: Member, Royal College of General Practitioners
quote: Good medicine takes time. That's what we're here to give you.
bio_1: Dr Secretary trained at the University of Manchester and spent years working within the NHS across general practice and acute medicine. He founded My Private Clinic to offer something straightforward: longer appointments, the same doctor every time, and space to actually talk.
bio_2: Every patient at My Private Clinic is seen by Dr Secretary directly. No locums, no rotation. The same doctor who sees you today will know your history next time.
bio_3: Dr Secretary grew up in Preston. At 16, he was walking the wards of Royal Preston Hospital as a clinical observer — the moment he knew medicine was his calling. He trained at the University of Manchester and returned to complete his GP training across Preston and Chorley. He has never left.
